event.title: Let`s DID it! @c-base! in Berlin, Deutschland

body.p: Switch to the good side on the first Sunday of the month!
The c-base supports you in regaining your digital autonomy. Together and step by step. Whether from X to Mastodon. From Google Chrome to Firefox – we will help you switch!

Why not test an e-mail service with more privacy? Or would you just like to learn more about other digital alternatives over a coffee, that strengthen our democracy instead of destroying it? Alternatives that ensure sustainable and self-determined participation for all of us?
To get started, Erik Grun (Co-coordinator of the FSFE Group in Berlin) will give an introduction to GNU+Linux and freedom-giving (Free) Software.
